texto: Pre-high tech, objects thunked and crashed and clopped, amid a thunder of drums, a tumult of trumpets. Today things beep and cheep and whistle. We have come from the roar of the lion to the chirp of the tree frog, ceaselessly bleating our identities while the frog-eating bats hover above us.
explicacao: Citação de A.J. Orde sobre temas ligados a tempo. “Pre-high tech, objects thunked and crashed and clopped, amid a thunder of drums, a tumult of trum…” articula tempo, modernity, sounds em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como sounds e technology.
